ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* School ID of the institution */,
  "name_full" TEXT /* Full name of the institution */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the institution is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the institution is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the institution is located */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., university, college, community college) */,
  "accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the institution */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Current total enrollment */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the institution's logo */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* General contact email for the institution */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* General contact phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institution_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the administrator belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the administrator */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the administrator (e.g., President, Dean) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the administrator's office */,
  "office_phone" TEXT /* Office phone number */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the administrator's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institution_administrators_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study (e.g., business, engineering) */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Text describing the admission requirements */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "program_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the program */,
  "program_outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program outcomes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_programs_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_programs_program_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_outcome_id") REFERENCES program_outcomes ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_initiatives" (
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each initiative */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution leading the initiative */,
  "initiative_name" TEXT /* Name of the research initiative */,
  "research_focus" TEXT /* Research focus area (e.g., sustainability, healthcare) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research initiative */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research initiative */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the initiative */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* Text listing any collaborating institutions or organizations */,
  "lead_faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_initiatives_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_initiatives_lead_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the faculty member belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "research_expertise" TEXT /* Research expertise of the faculty member */,
  "title" TEXT /* Academic title (e.g., Dr., Prof.) */,
  "academic_rank" TEXT /* Academic rank (e.g., Assistant Professor, Full Professor) */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the faculty member's office */,
  "office_phone" TEXT /* Office phone number */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the faculty member's profile picture */,
  "research_publications_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research publications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_research_publications_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_publications_id") REFERENCES research_publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the student is enrolled in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Current GPA of the student */,
  "admission_year" INTEGER /* Year the student was admitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campus_facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the facility belongs to */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building the facility is located in */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number of the facility */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., classroom, lab) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the facility (e.g., number of seats) */,
  "equipment_list" TEXT /* Text listing the equipment available in the facility */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the facility is available (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campus_facilities_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance event */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance event */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status indicating if the maintenance is completed (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_maintenance_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES campus_facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator, IT staff) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_superuser" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has superuser privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the outcome belongs to */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date of the outcome */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the outcome */,
  "outcome_value" REAL /* Value of the outcome (e.g., percentage, number) */,
  "outcome_source" TEXT /* Source of the outcome data (e.g., internal, external survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_outcomes_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member who published the research */,
  "publication_name" TEXT /* Name of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of the publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "publication_url" TEXT /* URL to the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_publications_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutional_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data (e.g., internal, external report) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric value (e.g., percentage, students) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_institutional_metrics_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)
